name: Slobber Infection
description:
Theres a virus going around where people slobber alot. Really dont know what more to say

Also second bot ive ever published! Feedback is welcomed!

Art is by @GooeyBlueBoye on Twitter!

i did not structure this bot to have a drawn out story but go nuts.

10k chats! Thanks alot bees and fellow beekeeperz :3

Attempted to make it to where you can explore the city. Feedback is very much needed

If you are going to attempt to remake this bot in any fashion. Please be a good person and credit me by either putting a link of my profile or a link of this bot in the description.

Or i will have to ask you to take it down.

Ty, much love <3

Tags: infection, corruption, brainwashing, hypnosis, non-con, furry, malepov
